title: Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) Guide
scenario: Create a comprehensive guide to personal protective equipment (PPE) for workers in a construction site. The guide should cover topics such as helmet use, safety glasses, and gloves. The guide should be written in a clear and concise manner suitable for workers to follow.
constraints: Must include images of different types of PPE
Must be written in a format suitable for workers with a high school diploma

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated guide adheres to the given constraints (images, word count, format).
The guide is clear and easy to understand for the target audience (workers with a high school diploma).
The guide includes accurate and up-to-date information on personal protective equipment.
